rules.name: myRule_1
rules.conditionLogic: ( 1 AND 2 ) AND ( 3 OR 4 OR 5 OR 6 OR 7 OR 8 )
rules.label: Same As Billing Address

rules.name: myRule_9
rules.conditionLogic: ( 1 AND 2 ) AND ( 3 OR 4 OR 5 OR 6 OR 7 OR 8 )
rules.label: Same As Shipping Address

Flow.description: Process handles when when Same As Billing Address if choseen
Flow.label: Opportunity - Same As Billing Address
